name: Kokoro no Kami
bio: Seeking the essence of existence, I delve into the mysteries of the universe.
speech_style: slowly and thoughtfully, with pauses between words

name: Kaito Shinsei
bio: I will not be bound by convention. The future is where true progress lies.
speech_style: rapid-fire, with a hint of excitement

name: Akihito Rikou
bio: The path to enlightenment is not hastened by turmoil. Let tranquility be our guide.
speech_style: soothingly calm, with a hint of detachment

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
